data.content: Implementation review rejected. The new response identity extractor is too broad: it treats unrelated nested ids as agentModel values, so responses without provider/model metadata can be mislabeled (confirmed with message.id -> msg_d42af031b001E9LrZkGS9Wy7jp). The added UI regression test also does not run because the unit Vitest config includes src/**/__tests__/**/*.test.ts, while the new file is src/components/__tests__/agent-history-session-card.test.tsx.
